The '''[[University/Legends|university]] at [[Lorrd City]]''' was revered around [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] as a great repository of academic knowledge. Contained in the heart of the [[City/Legends|city]], it was comprised of many different schools of learning, as well as a large student housing district.

{{Loc-stub}}

===Known Schools===
*[[Lorrd Academy for Aquatic Studies]]
*[[School of Conceptual Design]]
*[[University of Pangalactic Cultural Studies]]
